worknotes: "[{\"comment\": \"As per Arista , this is due to memory leak Bug ID 770511 \\r\\nArista suggested this is software defect 770511, a fix is available in 4.29.9.1, 4.30.1 or later, defect the version in use 4.28.6M is affected.\", \"added_by\": \"bhargavi.petapalli@ibm.com\", \"added_on\": \"2025-12-05T07:01:17Z\"}, {\"comment\": \"crn:v1:bluemix:public:iaas-network:dal13 | Agent IpRib initialized ::::ngcs751.1.sr02.dal13 | Agent IpRib initialized \\n\\n\\n{\\n \\\"affected_activity\\\": \\\"service-network-access\\\",\\n \\\"crn\\\": {\\n  \\\"version\\\": \\\"v1\\\",\\n  \\\"cname\\\": \\\"bluemix\\\",\\n  \\\"ctype\\\": \\\"public\\\",\\n  \\\"service_name\\\": \\\"iaas-network\\\",\\n  \\\"location\\\": \\\"dal13 | Agent IpRib initialized \\\",\\n  \\\"resource\\\": \\\"ngcs751.1.sr02.dal13 | Agent IpRib initialized \\\"\\n },\\n \\\"customer_impacting\\\": \\\"false\\\",\\n \\\"disable_pager\\\": \\\"true\\\",\\n \\\"tip_msg_type\\\": \\\"create.request\\\",\\n \\\"outage_start\\\": \\\"2025-12-04T03:30:58Z\\\",\\n \\\"severity\\\": 4,\\n \\\"short_description\\\": \\\"ngcs751.1.sr02.dal13 | Agent IpRib initialized \\\",\\n \\\"long_description\\\": \\\"Ticket Created By Premraj V ngcs751.1.sr02.dal13\\\",\\n \\\"source\\\": \\\"monitoring-tool\\\",\\n \\\"version\\\": \\\"1.0\\\"\\n}\\n\\n\\n ---------- \\n\\n\\nOne or more values of the u_environment field are invalid:\\n\\n{\\n  \\\"valid_environments\\\": [],\\n  \\\"invalid_environments\\\": [\\n    \\\"crn:v1:bluemix:public::dal13 | Agent IpRib initialized ::::\\\"\\n  ]\\n}\", \"added_by\": \"caleb.andrew.mccarthy@ibm.com\", \"added_on\": \"2025-12-04T03:41:31Z\"}, {\"comment\": \"Cloud Service: iaas-network \\n Invalid Resource :ngcs751.1.sr02.dal13 | Agent IpRib initialized \\n crn:v1:bluemix:public:iaas-network:dal13 | Agent IpRib initialized ::::ngcs751.1.sr02.dal13 | Agent IpRib initialized \", \"added_by\": \"caleb.andrew.mccarthy@ibm.com\", \"added_on\": \"2025-12-04T03:41:31Z\"}]"
